title: techmap: incorrect lowering of $shift/$shiftx cells (lack of B_SIGNED check)

features.name: dynamic multi-bit slice with signed variable index
features.description: Code should include a dynamic multi-bit slice extraction using a signed variable as the index multiplier, combined with a negative bit range declaration on the target signal
features.snippet: input [15:-16] A; input signed [5:0] B; assign Y = A[B*4+:4];

features.name: right shift with signed shift amount
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount is declared as signed, which when incorrectly lowered by techmap causes incorrect evaluation results
features.snippet: input signed [5:0] B; wire [3:0] Y = A >> B;
